ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescription_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the statistic belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "narcotic" INTEGER /* Number of narcotic prescriptions */,
  "non_narcotic" INTEGER /* Number of non-narcotic prescriptions */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of narcotic prescriptions relative to total prescriptions */,
  "dosage" REAL /* Average dosage per prescription */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the prescribed drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescription_stats_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_means" (
  "mean_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly mean */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the mean was calculated for */,
  "yearly_mean" REAL /* Yearly mean of prescriptions */,
  "from_yearly_mean" REAL /* Deviation from the yearly mean */,
  "mean_narcotic" REAL /* Yearly mean of narcotic prescriptions */,
  "mean_non_narcotic" REAL /* Yearly mean of non-narcotic prescriptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mean_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to (e.g., hospital, university, research center) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prescription statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the statistic (e.g., filters, aggregation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES prescription_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notif_message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "notif_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data available, system update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prescription statistic the permission applies to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access permission (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES prescription_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
